steps.title: Make two points from the slope
steps.content: The condition $f(0)=3$ gives the point $(0,3)$. A slope of $69$ means one step to the right raises $y$ by $69$, so another point is $(1,72)$. Enter those two rows in Desmos.

steps.title: Run the linear regression
steps.content: Use $y_1 \sim mx_1+b$. Desmos returns $m=69$ and $b=3$, so the function is $f(x)=69x+3$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: Choice A has intercept $0$, choice B has slope $3$, and choice C has intercept $0$. Only choice D has slope $69$ and $f(0)=3$. Choice D is correct.
